title: Fix Scorecard missing-score return contract and ReportTask effect deps

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Verified both reports. Scorecard has an early return for score_class None, but get_score_result still relies on a redundant if score_class is not None block. Adding explicit defensive fallback return to enforce list-return contract. In ReportTask, removing reportBlocks array reference from useEffect deps to prevent reference-churn reruns.
